title: Prism-AutoGG
description: Never miss a "GG" again — clean, fast, and perfectly timed.
body:
# 💬 Prism-AutoGG

> **Never miss a "GG" again — clean, fast, and perfectly timed.**

---

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/059f4cc5e4177d5a03281c754acb9c3d3afce82a.png)

## ⚡ Overview

**Prism-AutoGG** is a lightweight, high-performance utility mod designed for competitive Minecraft players.

Whether you're grinding **Crystal PvP**, dominating **minigames**, or playing on fast-paced servers — Prism ensures your sportsmanship stays sharp and consistent.

> ⚡ **Automatic. Instant. Professional.**

---

## 🚀 Features

- 🤖 **Intelligent Trigger System**  
  Detects the exact moment a match ends and sends your message instantly  

- ⏱ **Custom Delay Control**  
  Fine-tune when your "GG" is sent for a natural feel  

- 🧠 **Smart Detection Logic**  
  Optimized for different server environments and game modes  

- 🪶 **Ultra Lightweight**  
  Runs silently in the background with zero FPS impact  

- 🔗 **Prism Ecosystem Ready**  
  Seamlessly works with other Prism mods  

---

## 🎯 Why Use Prism-AutoGG?

> In competitive Minecraft, even small details matter.

- ⚡ Respond instantly after matches  
- 🎮 Stay focused on gameplay  
- 💬 Maintain consistent sportsmanship  
- 🧠 Look natural — not robotic  

---

## ⚙ Configuration

- Simple and clean config menu  
- Customize:
  - Delay timing  
  - Message behavior  

---

## 📦 Compatibility

- ✔ Minecraft **1.21+**  
- ✔ **Fabric Loader**  
- ✔ 100% **Client-Side**  

---

## 💡 Philosophy

**Automation should feel human.**  
Prism-AutoGG is built to enhance your gameplay — not interrupt it.

---

## 🔮 Future Plans

- 🧠 Advanced detection system (server-specific)
- 💬 Multiple message presets
- 🎛 GUI improvements
- 🔗 Deeper Prism integration
